headline: Nutraceutical Gummies Global Market Forecast Report 2026-2030: Plant-Based and Sugar-Free Trends Drive Expansion into Personalized Nutrition and AI-Driven Formulation Models
summary: The global nutraceutical gummies market is predicted to grow from USD 24.39 billion in 2025 to USD 47.80 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 14.4%. Key drivers include rising vitamin deficiency rates, a focus on preventive health, and the preference for gummies over pills. The growing popularity of plant-based and sugar-free variants, along with online and DTC sales channels, are accelerating market expansion, especially in Europe.
